# Copilot Instructions

Follow the v1.5 contributor workflow for this repository.

- Read `AGENTS.md` first for architecture boundaries.
- Read `dev/AGENTS.md` for the `@dev` workspace contract.
- Read `dev/ops/AGENTS.md` for contributor operation rules.
- Keep contributor mission state in `dev/ops/`.
- Keep contributor docs in `dev/docs/`.
- Keep Goblin fixtures and overlay tests in `dev/goblin/`.
- Keep runtime logic in `core/` or `wizard/`.

Use `ucode` as the standard runtime. Use `vibe` only inside the active Dev Mode lane.
